title: UNI student helps preserve hidden Grant Wood history for upcoming documentary
summary_en: Not many college students get the chance to work with a historic piece of art created by an internationally-renowned artist – but for University of Northern Iowa student Anissa Droessler, that rare opportunity became a reality. Droessler, a UNI Art Education major, recently contributed to a documentary project centered on Grant Wood’s World War I memorial windows, located in the Cedar Rapids Veter
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学学生参与保存格兰特·伍德历史资料 助力即将上映纪录片

title: UNI announces 2026 Homecoming theme “The Future is Purple”
summary_en: Panthers near and far will gather in Cedar Falls this October to celebrate “The Future is Purple” for the University of Northern Iowa Homecoming.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学公布2026年返校节主题“未来是紫色”
summary_cn: 北爱荷华大学（UNI）于近期正式宣布，其2026年返校节主题确定为“未来是紫色”。本次活动定于今年十月在锡达福尔斯市举行，届时来自各地的“黑豹”社区成员将齐聚一堂。该主题恰如其分地呼应了UNI建校150周年庆典的压轴篇章，标志着学校在培养在校生及校友以影响爱荷华州乃至更广阔地区方面，即将迈向新的150年征程。

title: UNI celebrates completed nursing facility for BSN programs
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is celebrating its newly completed nursing facility, giving students access to advanced, hands-on training designed to mirror real-world clinical environments.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学庆祝新建护理设施落成 助力护理学理学学士项目发展

title: Dates announced for free Gallagher Bluedorn Block Party series
summary_en: The Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center has announced the 2026 schedule for its free summer Block Party series, with the University of Northern Iowa Sesquicentennial Celebration as the platinum sponsor of the series.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学加拉格尔·布鲁多恩表演艺术中心公布2026年免费夏季街区派对系列日期
summary_cn: 美国艾奥瓦州锡达福尔斯消息——加拉格尔·布鲁多恩表演艺术中心已公布其2026年度免费夏季街区派对系列的活动日程。该系列由北爱荷华大学一百五十周年庆典活动作为铂金赞助商予以支持。系列演出计划自2026年6月起持续至9月初，届时将在锡达福尔斯及滑铁卢地区的公园和社区举办现场音乐表演。
